{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323020419A4061F95528124E74C7E"}"},"total":276},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7613441368430822168","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"魔女+穿越经营是老套路了，但是和原住民的关系博弈还蛮有趣的
感觉作者很用心编了超级多奇奇怪怪的材料名字特别好玩，领地内的各种有意识的魔法生物也很有趣 另一方面对女主人际关系的描写也不错，很多作者不会写硬写一堆说教的话，女主就容易显蠢，作者在这方面写得不多反而塑造出女主一种有底线沉默且强大的感觉，心理描写也挺萌的让人感觉女主特别有魅力，，已爱上，，完全戳中我，，"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772646553,"group_id":"7596634110328572953","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5Oih4IVIoavUU3ls9Fz6jVAYZAvgCzzbY0Az6QhB6Vk","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2228071809954555","user_name":"龙殿的纪宁"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2228071809954555","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7596634110328572953","book_info":{"abstract":"【种植、游戏、经营、生存、升级庇护家园！】
【女主无CP、创造、治愈、女巫、NPC扮演！】
-
开局穿越异世界，全民西幻生存游戏，各种天灾魔法频升！
土壤污染、神明侵蚀、元素暴动、原住民动乱……
异世界的玩家全是行走的资源点！
冰元素极寒、植物大变异、酸雨、炎日、饥荒！
活下去，活到游戏的最后一天。
-
粟陌开局2X2土地和一根锄头。
粟陌：认真的吗？
幸好，粟陌有超强魔法天赋。
特殊的魔法生物？抓了，抓来种田；
特殊的魔法植物？抓了，抓来做农场的主要生产农作物！
特殊的原住民？抓了，呃，抓来做农场的NPC开垦土地！
魔法的最大爱好就是，建造自己的农场家园！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/449883b5e5b3b93452f40c0162d93f72","author":"南北鸳","author_id":"","book_id":"7596634110328572953","book_name":"魔女的农场：生存游戏建造家园","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8a8a0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":493,"name":"钓鱼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=493&name=钓鱼&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7596634281477145113","read_count":"51646","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"396345"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"176","tags":"游戏体育,幻想言情,穿越,无CP,钓鱼,天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oa112cfe9f054a7281cfdffa1d2905a27~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779386660&x-signature=W29LH0PAZN7vVujdbi%2FGgaGe81I%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3699221389125694","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"175"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323020419A4061F95528124E74C7E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":39,"forwarded_coun
